title: RepoBrief Agent Workbench boundary
goal: Define and sequence the external Write-Axis / Agent Workbench boundary without moving patch or runtime authority into RepoBrief core.
completion: The RepoBrief versus Agent Workbench boundary is documented.
Patch-evaluation artifacts are specified before any runtime workbench implementation.
RepoBrief remains read-only with respect to patch/test execution.
Overlapping Lenskit-agent-optimization suggestions are mapped to existing roadmap tasks instead of duplicated blindly.

metadata.source_thread: Lenskit / RepoBrief / rLens Write-Axis planning after PR #889
metadata.prerequisite_observation: User reported Lenskit PR #889 merged; live verification remains required at task start.
metadata.boundary_decision: Write/Patch/Test/Sandbox is external Agent Workbench, not RepoBrief core.
